heading: Commercial standards for passenger safety devices
label: 17103 Commercial standards for passenger safety devices
text: The Administrator of General Services shall prescribe and publish in the Federal Register commercial standards for passenger safety devices the Administrator requires under . Changes in the standards take effect one year and 90 days after the publication of the standards in the Federal Register.section 17102 of this title
